payment.title: {{token}} Payment
payment.subtitle: Please use {{networkName}} {{network}} network for transfer
payment.countdownSubtitle: Please complete the transfer within the specified time. Do not pay if timeout, reorder instead
payment.instrinfoAlipay: Must use Alipay (Mainland China) for transfer, UnionPay/NihaoPay/Meituan App are not supported
payment.instrinfoWXPay: Please use WeChat Pay, JD Pay and UnionPay are also accepted
payment.instruction1: Must use {{network}} network for transfer, do not send {{warningToken}}!
payment.instruction2: The system will automatically confirm the receipt after transfer
payment.instruction3: Transfer amount must exactly match the displayed amount
payment.instruction4: If you have any questions, please contact customer service
payment.instrIncorrectPayment: If you discover that the wrong amount was transferred, please do not attempt to make up the difference. Please contact the customer service for a full refund
payment.cashierInstr1: Please select your preferred payment method for transfer
payment.timeoutMessage:
Sorry, the payment time has expired.
Please initiate payment again or contact customer service.
payment.confirmationMessage: Payment request detected, blockchain confirmation in progress...
payment.confirmationNote: Please wait patiently, the system will automatically detect the confirmation status
payment.transactionHash: Your payment has been confirmed. Transaction hash:
payment.loadPaymentNetworkFailed: Failed to load payment network, please check if wallet is added.
